---
title: "Contact Us"
title-block-style: none
description: "Get in touch with chen.ist. Book a consultation, send us an email, or visit our offices in Craiova and Bucharest, Romania."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Get in <span class="gr">Touch</span></h1>
    <p>Questions, projects, or just a conversation — reach us at <a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri m-contact-info">
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
          <h3>Email</h3>
          <p><a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a> — General inquiries</p>
          <p><a href="mailto:support@chen.ist">support@chen.ist</a> — Support</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Headquarters</h3>
          <p>Str. Filantropiei, 1-3, 200143<br>Craiova, Romania</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Partners Office</h3>
          <p>Bucharest, Romania<br><a href="mailto:bucharest@chen.ist">bucharest@chen.ist</a></p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci m-social">
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="m-ri m-form">
        <h2 style="text-align:left;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2rem);margin-bottom:2rem;">Send a message</h2>
        <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Full Name *</label>
              <input type="text" name="name" required placeholder="Your full name">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Email *</label>
              <input type="email" name="email" required placeholder="your@email.com">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Phone</label>
              <input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="Phone number">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Company</label>
              <input type="text" name="company" placeholder="Company (optional)">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Interest *</label>
            <select name="interest" required>
              <option value="">Select...</option>
              <optgroup label="Services">
                <option value="digital-infrastructure">Digital Infrastructure</option>
                <option value="cybersecurity">Cybersecurity</option>
                <option value="nis2">NIS2 Compliance</option>
                <option value="cloud">Cloud Services</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Academy">
                <option value="course">Course Enrollment</option>
                <option value="training">Training Registration</option>
                <option value="event">Event / Hackathon</option>
                <option value="webinar">Webinar</option>
                <option value="summer-school">Summer School</option>
              </optgroup>
              <option value="general">General Inquiry</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Message *</label>
            <textarea name="message" rows="4" required placeholder="How can we help you?"></textarea>
          </div>
          <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="New Contact from chen.ist">
          <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="contact-page">
          <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
          <div class="fc">
            <input type="checkbox" required>
            <span>I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> *</span>
          </div>
          <button type="submit"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Send Message</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Prefer a live<br>conversation?</h2>
    <p>Book directly in our calendar. 30 minutes, no strings attached.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book on Cal.com</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> EU & International
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
